title: BEM-846 move queue step
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:07 (UTC+3)'
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
# Remove prior queue marker/commit/processor blocks by line scanning.
lines=text.splitlines()
remove_names=['Queue processor execution marker','Commit queue processor marker results','Process workflow dispatch queue','Commit workflow dispatch queue results']
out=[]; i=0
while i < len(lines):
    line=lines[i]
    if any(('- name: '+name) in line for name in remove_names):
        i+=1
        while i < len(lines) and not lines[i].startswith('      - name:') and not lines[i].startswith('      - uses:'):
            i+=1
        continue
    out.append(line); i+=1
lines=out
block=[
'      - name: Queue processor execution marker',
'        if: always()',
'        run: bash scripts/mark_queue_processor_step_seen.sh',
'      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue',
'        if: always()',
'        env:',
'          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}',
'        run: bash scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh',
'      - name: Commit queue processor marker results',
'        if: always()',
'        run: bash scripts/commit_queue_processor_marker_results.sh'
]
# Insert after checkout step block, before the next step after checkout.
inserted=False
new=[]; i=0
while i < len(lines):
    new.append(lines[i])
    if (not inserted) and 'uses: actions/checkout' in lines[i]:
        i+=1
        while i < len(lines):
            new.append(lines[i])
            if i+1 < len(lines) and (lines[i+1].startswith('      - name:') or lines[i+1].startswith('      - uses:')):
                new.extend(block)
                inserted=True
                break
            i+=1
    i+=1
if not inserted:
    # fallback: after first steps: line
    final=[]; done=False
    for line in lines:
        final.append(line)
        if not done and line.strip()=='steps:':
            final.extend(block)
            done=True
    new=final
runner.write_text('\n'.join(new)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-846','status':'queue_processor_moved_after_checkout','inserted':True,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem846_move_queue_processor_after_checkout.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem846_move_queue_processor_after_checkout.md').write_text('# BEM-846 | Move Queue Processor After Checkout | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick and verify queue marker/result. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-846'+sep+sep+'Queue processor moved after checkout. Next: tick and verify marker/result.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(runner),'governance/state/bem846_move_queue_processor_after_checkout.json','governance/reports/bem846_move_queue_processor_after_checkout.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Moved queue marker, queue processor, and queue marker commit steps to the beginning of codex-runner job immediately after checkout')
"""
No issue comments.
